walletMenu.totalBalanceTooltip: Your total balance may not always be accurate due to potential indexing issues. We're on it!
walletMenu.totalBalanceRefresh: Click here to restart the indexing of your tokens now.

themes.lightModeDisabled: Light mode is disabled for this theme
themes.darkModeDisabled: Dark mode is disabled for this theme
themes.systemModeDisabled: System mode is disabled for this theme

discordBanner.ctaHeadline: Join our Discord to learn more

solanaAlert.title: Limited Solana token support
solanaAlert.subtitle: Currently only USDC and USDT can be bridged to and from Solana.

seiAlert.title: Linking of SEI EVM wallet required
seiAlert.subtitle: To use SEI EVM, you need to link your wallet address to the SEI ecosystem.

abstractAlert.title: This wallet only works on Abstract!
abstractAlert.subtitle: The Abstract Wallet only exist on Abstract. Don't use this address on any other blockchain, you will lose your funds.

error.message: Something went wrong. Please try reloading the page. If the problem persists, contact our support.

connected.title: Multisig wallet connected
connected.description: Please notify other wallet participants to be ready to sign.

transactionInitiated.title: Multiple signatures required
transactionInitiated.description: Please notify other multisig wallet participants to sign before the transaction expires.

completedMissionsInformation.description: As Jumper organize ad-hoc campaigns, the missions are updated on a monthly basis to create the associated graphics. Keep in mind: XP coming from specific campaigns will be updated on a monthly basis as well.

format.currencyCompact: {{value, currencyExt(currency: USD; notation: compact; compactDisplay: short)}}

contribution.title: Contribute
contribution.description: Show your appreciation by adding a contribution. 100% of it goes to improve Jumper.

error.amountTooSmall: The contribution amount is too small for this token. Please try a larger amount.
error.noFeeAddress: No contribution fee address configured for this chain.

tooltips.tvl: Total value of crypto assets deposited in this market.
tooltips.apy: Expected yearly return rate of the tokens invested.
tooltips.rewardsApy: Expected yearly return rate distributed in reward token.
tooltips.deposit: The token on which the market is defined and yield accrues on.
tooltips.deposited: The token you have deposited into this market.
tooltips.boostedApy: {{baseApy}}% is the expected yearly return rate of the underlying tokens invested. The extra {{boostedApy}}% in rewards - distributed in another token - are paid exclusively to the participant of this zap campaign.
tooltips.lockupPeriod: Once deposited, your position is subject to an {{formattedLockupPeriod}} lock-up period before you can withdraw the funds.
tooltips.manageYourPosition: You can also manage your funds (withdraw, check PNL) on {{partnerName}} UI by clicking on this button
tooltips.assets_one: The asset you will earn from
tooltips.assets_other_one: The asset you will earn from
tooltips.assets_other: The assets you will earn from
tooltips.chains_one: The chain you will earn from
tooltips.chains_other: The chains you will earn from
tooltips.protocol: The protocol you will earn from
tooltips.noPositionsToManage: You do not have any positions to manage
tooltips.capInDollar: Available liquidity capacity of the market
tooltips.depositDisabled: Deposit currently disabled for this opportunity. <0>Go to {{protocolName}}</0>
tooltips.withdrawDisabled: Withdraw currently disabled for this opportunity. <0>Go to {{protocolName}}</0>

zap.depositSuccess: You will be able to see your position in a few seconds or alternatively by clicking on <bold>Manage your position</bold> that redirects to {{partnerName}} UI

non-evm.title: Your wallet is currently not supported
non-evm.description: We are working on adding support for non-EVM wallets. In the meantime please use an EVM wallet to execute transactions.

not-supported.title: Your wallet is currently not supported
not-supported.description: Please use an {{type}} wallet to execute transactions for this opportunity.

earn.depositSuccess: You will be able to see and manage your position in a few seconds by clicking on <bold>Manage your positions</bold>

claimedPerk.title: Perk claimed!
claimedPerk.description: You have verified this perk with the following address
claimedPerk.howToUsePerkDescription: Simply add the code we provide you in the checkout of the Nansen website.

signatureFailed.title: Signature required
signatureFailed.description: You need to sign the transaction to confirm ownership of the wallet address.

validationFailed.title: Validation failed
validationFailed.description: Please check the fields and try again.

unsupportedWallet.title: Unsupported wallet
unsupportedWallet.description: We don't support this wallet type. Please use a different wallet to complete this mission.

unknown.title: Unknown error
unknown.description: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

username.title: Enter username
username.description_one: {{position}} you must first share your {{usernameType}} username.

email.title: Enter email
email.description_one: {{position}} you must first share your email address.
email.description_other: {{position}} you must share your email address.

wallet.title: Verify wallet
wallet.description_one: {{position}} you must sign a message to verify ownership of the below connected wallet address.
wallet.description_other: {{position}} you must sign a message to verify ownership of the below connected wallet address.

privateSwap.title: You're going Incognito
privateSwap.subtitle: Set recipient address to keep it private.
privateSwap.disclaimer1: The address is correct and not an exchange wallet. Tokens sent to the wrong address can't be retrieved.
privateSwap.disclaimer2: This transaction is fulfilled by a centralized provider who might ask for KYC if it's flagged.

chainSingleSelect.notSupported: Selected chain is not supported for this operation

amount.overZero: Amount must be greater than zero

tokenSingleSelect.notSupported: Selected token is not supported for this operation

tokenMultiSelect.max_one: You can select up to {{count}} token
tokenMultiSelect.max_other: You can select up to {{count}} tokens
tokenMultiSelect.notSupported: One or more selected tokens are not supported
